M0780_CU_ORAL_MED (M0780) Current Management of Oral Medications Current ability to prepare and take oral medications. 00 = Able to independently take the correct oral medication(s) and proper dosage(s) at the correct times.
01 = Able to take medication(s) at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in advance by another person; OR (b) given daily reminders; OR (c)
